compression_reason: To state which distinctions are revision-relevant and preserve them effectively, the substrate must specify recoverable content, admissibility, dependency, historical identity, and a uniform recovery procedure. The five RCCD commitments are therefore relocated rather than derived from fewer independent commitments.
interpretation: Within C*, P*, the broadened uniform effective representation family, and the frozen cost and machinery rules, no tested non-vacuous substrate strictly below RCCD derives R1-R5. RCCD remains the lowest internally justified kernel level.
remaining_limits: the candidate search is broad but not logically exhaustive over every conceivable ontology
principled inaccessibility remains neither support nor defeat
registered-level irreducibility is not metaphysical fundamentality
external review and actual-process correspondence remain unexecuted
